meta.title: Testimonial Editor
meta.description: Editor interface for Testimonial posts — stores all data as post meta with no frontend render

tsx: TextControl, TextareaControl, SelectControl, ToggleGroupControl, ToggleGroupControlOption from @wordpress/components

requiredPatterns.usage: Both block component and sidebar panel must return null if postType !== 'testimonial'
Use useSelect to read meta, useDispatch(coreEditorStore).editPost({ meta: {...} }) to write
useEffect to sync meta.name to post title via editPost({ title: meta.name })
All meta fields editable in both block body and PluginDocumentSettingPanel sidebar
Update inc/post-types/testimonial.php with template and template_lock keys

qualityChecklist: block.json has inserter: false, multiple: false, attributes: {}
Post type guard in both block and sidebar panel
All meta fields in both body and sidebar
Template lock added to post type registration
Sidebar panel import added to editor.js

metaFields.name: name
metaFields.description: Name of the person giving the testimonial

metaFields.name: message
metaFields.notes: Long text field — use TextareaControl for multi-line editing. The card template renders this inside a <blockquote> with wp_kses_post, so HTML is allowed.

metaFields.name: videoSource
metaFields.description: Video source type: file (media library), youtube, or vimeo

metaFields.name: videoFile
metaFields.description: Media library attachment ID for video file
metaFields.notes: Show only when videoSource is 'file'. Use MediaUpload from @wordpress/block-editor with a button to select/replace video. Display the filename when a file is selected.

metaFields.name: videoId
metaFields.description: YouTube or Vimeo video ID (not full URL)
metaFields.notes: Show only when videoSource is 'youtube' or 'vimeo'. Label should dynamically show 'YouTube Video ID' or 'Vimeo Video ID' based on videoSource.

blockWrapper.notes: Editor-only styling. Use minimal layout for clean editing experience.

fieldGroup.notes: Group related fields vertically with consistent spacing

videoSection.classes: flex flex-col gap-3 border-t border-gray-200 pt-4 mt-2
videoSection.notes: Visually separate the video fields from the text fields with a top border

mobile.behavior: N/A — editor-only block, responsive behavior is handled by WordPress editor UI

emptyState.field: All fields start empty. The block body should show placeholder text/labels for each field.

editorBehavior.autoTitleSync: name field syncs to post title
editorBehavior.templateLock: Block is template-locked into testimonial post type
editorBehavior.inserterRestriction: Block does not appear in block inserter

decisions.decision: All data stored as post meta, no block attributes
decisions.evidence: cpt-block.md specifies attributes: {} and editPost({ meta }) pattern

decisions.decision: Video fields separated from text fields with a visual divider
decisions.evidence: card-testimonial.php renders video button separately at bottom of card, suggesting logical grouping

decisions.decision: Use ToggleGroupControl for videoSource instead of SelectControl
decisions.evidence: cpt-block.md maps string enums to ToggleGroupControl for better UX with small option sets (3 options)

decisions.decision: Auto-sync name meta field to post title
decisions.evidence: cpt-block.md section 3 specifies auto-title sync for primary text field

decisions.decision: Template lock 'all' for testimonial post type
decisions.evidence: cpt-block.md section 6 recommends 'all' for CPT blocks

decisions.decision: Use TextareaControl for message field instead of RichText
decisions.evidence: card-testimonial.php uses wp_kses_post for message output, but the field is stored as a simple string meta. TextareaControl is simpler and avoids block-attribute complexity. If rich formatting is needed, can upgrade later.

decisions.decision: Use MediaUpload button for videoFile field
decisions.evidence: card-testimonial.php uses wp_get_attachment_url(videoFile), indicating this is a media library attachment ID. MediaUpload provides the standard WordPress media picker.

testPage.description: Create a draft testimonial post to test the CPT block. The block will be auto-inserted via template lock.
testPage.title: Test Testimonial - QA
